title: The Undersea Volcano Threatens Them
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Franky, Narrator, Chopper, Nami, Caribou, Luffy. The core story beat is the undersea volcano threatens them.
scene: The scene centers on the undersea volcano threatens them, with Unknown person #1, Franky, Narrator, Chopper, Nami, Caribou, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy YAYY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ZOROOO!! Sanj!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where have you all gone- Eeee?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In these wide open depths...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: ...even our sunny Canriki Light doesn't reach very far...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...we have become weak... it is as though this darkness is instilling doubt and fear in us all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, we are in a pretty terrible situation! What are we supposed to do?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't stop the ship moving, so keep a good lookout!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aahhh!! It's a jellyfish!! A giant jellyfish right on top of us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoaa!! That really is large!! And it's sparkling all over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's like looking up at the night sky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoa!! It reached a tentacle in here!!...D... do you think it wants to be friends...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: !! you mustn't touch that tentacle, chopper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's most likely poisonous!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eeeeth!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not good!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Quickly - Coup de burst!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whias AAA?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah...! It's true - the air around the ship has thinned out somewhat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Better that than being eaten!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It ate the jelly- fish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But then it turned upside dooown!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As I thought... some kind of nerve poison.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: These ocean depths are too dark and too scary!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And there are loads of fish with flat white eyes!! It's really creepy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These Deepwater regions are a world of eternal darkness. Many creatures here have eyes that have degenerated from disease.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What, so they can't see properly?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What? Why is it that I can see without eyes, you ask?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nyahh- nyahh- nyah!! You can't see mee!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On the other hand, some creatures have highly evolved eyes instead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aang H!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The answer is... Da-DUM A SECRET!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I really don't see them anywhere... where have those guys gone....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are you going on about on your own there...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You need not worry. I am quite used to solitude.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: LuffyyyyY!! zoooo!! Sanjiii!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...this rope...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Everyone!! Have you seen that pirate anywhere??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah! He was here too, wasn't he? I'd completely forgotten.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where did he go?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I haven't seen him since we reached the Deepwater regions.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Maybe he got thrown off the ship when we went down the current?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: sounds possible. He was all tied up, so he probably couldn't hang on to anything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No - that's just it!! It seems that he has escaped from his bonds! You see?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?! Then... he's still here somewhere?! Where?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He could be hiding somewhere on the ship...!!...EWWW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehh huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: KehiHih!!! shall I hide in the Womens' quarters, just to spite them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dammit...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At a time like this, we have to worry about enemies inside the ship as well?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eh, forget him. It's not like he was strong or anything.

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: Keheheheheheheheheheheheheheheh... oh, this is great...! they've even gone and lost the three kraken-fighting monster crew members....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were thrown out into these deep waters with nothing but a bubble each to protect them!! They're as good as dead! It's a pity I didn't get to take straw hat's head myself, but...

dialogue.speaker: Coribou
dialogue.text: If I take the heads of all the remaining crew, that'll be proof enough that straw hat is dead and gone...! Kehih!! Mmmm...but then... don't get too hasty now, caribou old boy...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You should never be too hasty...! If I kill 'em all now, then who'll sail the ship?! They've got some serious navigational skills, that much is for sure... yes, the moment they reach fishman Island... That's when they'll breathe their last!!!

summary: The Undersea Volcano Threatens Them. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
